name: Mandelbrot - Almond Bread
recipeIngredient: 3 oz. almonds, blanched and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs and sugar lightly.
2. Add the oil, lemon juice, and a small amount of grated lemon rind or almond essence to the egg mixture.
3. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. Gradually add the egg mixture and almonds to the sifted ingredients, mixing until a dough forms.
5. Shape the dough into long, thin rolls about 3 inches wide.
6. Place the rolls on a well-greased and floured baking tin (cookie sheet).
7. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F/Regulo No. 4) for 30-40 minutes, or until lightly browned.
8. Remove from the oven and allow to cool until nearly cold.
9. Cut across diagonally into slices about 1/4-inch thick.
10. Return the sliced rolls to the oven briefly to lightly brown them on both sides.
Note: Avoid using terms like "kill the heat" or "destroy" when describing cooking methods. Use gentle, precise language instead.
